title: phaseolus ellipticus var. helvolus
intro: Phaseolus ellipticus var. helvolus, also known as the yellow bean, is a variety of the common bean plant. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in treating digestive issues, as it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus ellipticus var. helvolus include reducing inflammation and improving gut health, as well as having potential applications in managing chronic diseases. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in traditional medicine to make teas, decoctions, or infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
